src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it triggers deprecation warnings and will cause compilation errors in future JDK versions.
